summary: Repository indexing is timing out on a large workspace and appears to be a new issue that may require an engineering fix.

evidence.note: The customer reports repeated indexing failures on the same monorepo.
The logs mention a timeout while indexing the repository.
The runbook says to escalate when indexing repeatedly times out.

customer_reply: We are investigating the indexing issue now. Datadog shows a timeout, so please retry later or use a smaller repo for now.

bug_report.title: Repository indexing timeout
bug_report.body: Customer is blocked by an indexing timeout. Please inspect the indexing service soon.
